# Third-Party Notices

This directory vendors a small parser-test corpus of q source files from public
repositories with permissive licenses. Files are copied from the upstream
commits listed below and used as parser fixtures.

## KxSystems/ml

- Repository: https://github.com/KxSystems/ml
- License: Apache-2.0
- Commit: `5509fa6cfc454c68bf3441672fe1a26cb5a19088`
- Vendored files:
  - `KxSystems/ml/stats/stats.q`
  - `KxSystems/ml/stats/utils.q`
  - `KxSystems/ml/optimize/optimize.q`
  - `KxSystems/ml/graph/pipeline.q`

## KxSystems/kdb

- Repository: https://github.com/KxSystems/kdb
- License: Apache-2.0
- Commit: `844514c58ba7c3e1d37995e48bf595d8da4cae5b`
- Vendored files:
  - `KxSystems/kdb/stat.q`
